title: Primary School Teacher [EMS]
description:
Our client is a well-established enrichment centre with over 20 locations islandwide. They are seeking dynamic and passionate teachers to join them on their journey of nurturing young minds and supporting academic excellence.


If you're someone who naturally connects with kids, loves helping them grow both academically and confidently, and believes that learning should be fun, engaging, and meaningful — then you might be exactly who we're looking for!


Location: Multiple locations islandwide


Why Join Us?

  • Inspire and Empower: Help students unlock their full potential in English, Math, Science, or other core subjects.
  • Support You Can Count On: Access to resources, training, and a supportive teaching team.
  • Grow With Us: Opportunities for long-term growth, development, and bonus incentives.

Your Role:

  • Deliver engaging, effective tuition sessions in line with school syllabus.
  • Monitor and track student progress, providing constructive feedback to both students and parents.
  • Inspire and motivate students to achieve academic success.
  • Participate in training, curriculum development, and professional development activities.
  • Support company initiatives through events, feedback, and continuous improvement efforts.
  • Adapt lessons to suit each child’s unique learning pace.
  • Create a safe, motivating, and encouraging learning space.

Who We’re Looking For:

  • A patient, positive, and passionate educator who enjoys working with kids aged 6–12.
  • Motivated to nurture young minds/ share knowledge
  • A creative thinker who can make learning enjoyable and engaging.

Requirements:

  • No experience required as training will be provided
  • Degree in any discipline
  • Able to handle multiple subjects - primary English, Math and Science
  • Commit to 3 weekdays and both weekends (Sat & Sun)


Are you ready to make a difference in the lives of young learners?



Click on Apply NOW to submit your resume.

Kindly note that only short listed candidates will be contacted.



Search Avenue Pte Ltd

EA License No.: 25C2695


EA Registration No.: R25157669|Amanda Wee

postedCompany.description:
At Search Avenue Pte Ltd, we believe recruitment is more than just filling positions — it’s about building futures. Founded by two passionate individuals with over 12 years of recruitment experience, Search Avenue was born out of a shared vision: to raise the standards of recruitment through integrity, innovation, and unwavering dedication to people.

We are deeply committed to understanding the evolving needs of both employers and candidates. Our approach combines advanced technology with a human touch, ensuring personalized, efficient, and meaningful hiring experiences. Whether it’s permanent placements, executive searches, or talent mapping, our mission remains the same — to connect top-tier talent with companies that value diversity, capability, and culture fit.

Driven by our founders’ belief in work-life harmony, we champion flexible career opportunities and inclusive workplaces. Our goal is to empower individuals to thrive in their careers while honoring their personal commitments — and to help businesses grow stronger through passionate, high-performing teams.

At Search Avenue, recruitment is our craft — and people are our purpose.
